selection_policy.note: This batch contains all remaining tier1_now pairs that do not already have checked-in Go translations. Unlike the earlier whole-problem seed batches, it keeps partial problem groups and also includes pairs that match the current repository-local automated exclusion rules so the pipeline can measure real successes and failures on the broader remaining pool.
